steps.title: Find the key comparison required by the conclusion
steps.content: The conclusion is that Great Britain had more damaging fungus species than either Switzerland or Hungary. To support this, we need data that compares fungus counts across all three countries.

steps.title: Identify which choice makes this comparison
steps.content:
Choice C directly reports Great Britain's 290 fungus species and compares it to the fungus species reported by Switzerland and Hungary—the fungi-to-fungi comparison the conclusion requires.

The other choices either focus on only Hungary without comparison to GB, compare fungi from one country to insects from another, or contain incorrect data.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
